name: ABDL Mafia Toy
description:
This bot is marked Dead Dove and has all the necessary warnings, read them before you come and scream at me in the comments lol. Consensual Non-consent is a big theme in this bot. ABDL of course, humiliation , and also male lactation and breastfeeding. Use of the nickname Princess, and cute frilly clothes will be used on User regardless of gender.

Alright this is either going to be a big hit, or a big miss 🥲 this is my first group bot so pleeease give me some grace (and some constructive criticism). I tried giving them distinctly differing personalities, at the risk of making them tropey. I'm sorry if you don't enjoy the male breastfeeding part, it's a major and hardly ever represented kink for me and I wanted to write for it.
